title: viola brevistipulata subsp. minor
intro: Viola brevistipulata subsp. minor is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the pansy family (Violaceae). This plant is also known as the 'Lesser Dog Violet' and is a perennial herb that is native to Europe. The medicinal properties of Viola brevistipulata subsp. minor include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system.
